title: Tracking who Trump is appointing to fill key administration roles
author: Chris Alcantara, Eric Lau, Nick Mourtoupalas
fullText: Follow President Trump’s progress filling over 800 positions, among about 1,300 that require Senate confirmation, in this tracker from The Washington Post and the Partnership for Public Service.
summary: Follow President Trump’s progress filling over 800 positions, among about 1,300 that require Senate confirmation, in this tracker from The Washington Post and the Partnership for Public Service.
